summary: Sprint 99 Frontend Testing - GPS UI Cleanup, On-Demand Duty SpotSelector Integration, Mutual Exclusion, and Component Extraction. All features verified through code review and UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: SpotSelector GPS Cleanup VERIFIED: Line 213-222 shows 'Enable location to find nearby spots' button instead of 'Getting your location...' text
OnDemandDutyIcon SpotSelector Integration VERIFIED: Line 112 imports and uses SpotSelector component
OnDemandDutyIcon Toggle Disabled VERIFIED: Line 40 'const canToggle = onDemandActive || selectedSpot' - toggle disabled until spot selected
OnDemandDutyIcon Toggle Classes VERIFIED: Line 88-95 shows 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' when !canToggle
OnDemandDutyIcon 'Active at:' Display VERIFIED: Lines 138-143 show 'Active at: {spot.name}' when onDemandActive && selectedSpot
OnDemandDutyIcon GPS Header VERIFIED: Lines 239-245 show GPS status in header with 🛰️ emoji, fades when spotsLoaded=true
OnDemandDutyIcon Mutual Exclusion VERIFIED: Lines 457-462 turn off Live mode when activating On-Demand with toast 'Switching to On-Demand mode. Live session ended.'
MediaCard.js Component VERIFIED: Exports MediaCard component with proper props (aspectRatio, showPrice, showStatus, etc.)
ActionButtons.js Component VERIFIED: Exports EditButton, DeleteButton, DownloadButton, ShareButton, ViewButton, PurchaseButton, AddButton, MediaActionButtons, PurchaseActionButtons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 99 features verified: 1) SpotSelector no longer shows 'Getting your location...' in body - replaced with 'Enable location to find nearby spots' button (line 213-222), 2) OnDemandDutyIcon has SpotSelector integration with toggle disabled until spot selected (line 40, 88-95), 3) OnDemandDutyIcon shows 'Active at: [Spot Name]' when enabled (lines 138-143), 4) GPS status in header with 🛰️ emoji that fades when loaded (lines 239-245), 5) Mutual exclusion implemented - activating On-Demand turns off Live with toast message (lines 457-462), 6) MediaCard.js and ActionButtons.js components extracted and working.

features_verified.spotselector_no_duplicate_gps: VERIFIED - Line 213-222: Shows 'Enable location to find nearby spots' button, not 'Getting your location...'
features_verified.ondemand_has_spotselector: VERIFIED - Line 112: SpotSelector component integrated in OnDemandMenuContent
features_verified.ondemand_toggle_disabled_until_spot: VERIFIED - Line 40: canToggle = onDemandActive || selectedSpot; Line 88-95: opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed when !canToggle
features_verified.ondemand_active_at_display: VERIFIED - Lines 138-143: Shows 'Active at: {spot.name}' when active
features_verified.ondemand_gps_header: VERIFIED - Lines 239-245: GPS status in header with 🛰️ emoji, condition {gpsStatus && !spotsLoaded}
features_verified.ondemand_mutual_exclusion: VERIFIED - Lines 457-462: Turns off Live when activating On-Demand with toast
features_verified.mediacard_component: VERIFIED - Exports MediaCard with aspectRatio, showPrice, showStatus, showSelection, isSelected, isPurchased, isLocked, isLoading props
features_verified.actionbuttons_component: VERIFIED - Exports EditButton, DeleteButton, DownloadButton, ShareButton, ViewButton, PurchaseButton, AddButton, MediaActionButtons, PurchaseActionButtons

ui_tests_executed.login_flow: PASS - Login with photographer credentials works
ui_tests_executed.on_demand_menu_opens: PASS - Clicking topnav-on-demand opens sheet with On-Demand Duty title
ui_tests_executed.spotselector_visible: PASS - 'Select Spot' header visible with 'Standard Range (10-20mi)' badge
ui_tests_executed.toggle_disabled: PASS - Toggle has classes 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' when no spot selected
ui_tests_executed.select_spot_to_enable_text: PASS - Shows 'Select spot to enable' text
ui_tests_executed.no_duplicate_gps_text: PASS - 0 occurrences of 'Getting location' in page content
